theme_and_archetype.rationale: For an AI-powered school owner dashboard, we need authority, clarity, and function-first precision. The dark theme prevents eye strain during extended use, while high-contrast data visualization ensures critical metrics (alerts, finances) are immediately visible. The aesthetic is 'Control Center' rather than 'Consumer App'.

typography.rules: Radical weight contrast. Do not use generic sans for headings. Use IBM Plex Sans for tabular data.

mono.usage: Financial figures, IDs, tabular data, code/query blocks

layout_and_spacing.structure: Three-column grid layout mimicking a high-end command center.

columns.column_1: Primary Nav (Icons only) - W: 64px or 80px, fixed, border-r border-zinc-800.
columns.column_2: Sidebar (Tools + Chat History) - W: 280px or 320px, fixed, border-r border-zinc-800. Contains available tools panel at the top and chat history list below.
columns.column_3: Main Chat Area - Fluid width (flex-1). Contains AI chat stream, embedded dashboard widgets, and a sticky input bar at the bottom.

sidebar.style: bg-zinc-950 border-r border-zinc-800 h-screen overflow-y-auto flex flex-col
sidebar.tools_panel: p-4 space-y-2 border-b border-zinc-800/50. Buttons should use surface styles (bg-zinc-900 hover:bg-zinc-800) with solid icons.

chat_area.input_bar: sticky bottom-0 p-4 border-t border-zinc-800 bg-zinc-950/80 backdrop-blur-xl

chat_messages.ai_message: flex gap-4 max-w-4xl. Avatar on left. Content uses typography rules. Data widgets (cards/tables) are embedded directly below text.
chat_messages.user_message: flex justify-end gap-4 max-w-4xl ml-auto. Content is simple text in a subtle colored bubble (e.g., bg-zinc-800 or muted primary).
chat_messages.data_widget: bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 rounded-lg p-5 w-full mt-4 shadow-sm. Sharp or max 8px radius.

data_visualization.cards: Use 'Control Room' tight gaps. Flat bg, 1px subtle border, NO heavy shadows. Use emerald/rose text for +/- trends.
data_visualization.tables: Shadcn Table. Dense layout. Use JetBrains Mono for numeric columns.
data_visualization.charts: Recharts. Grid lines should be very faint (border-zinc-800). Lines/Bars should use bright accents (Blue, Emerald) against dark bg.

buttons.primary: bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-500 text-white rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-offset-zinc-950
buttons.secondary: bg-zinc-800 hover:bg-zinc-700 text-zinc-100 rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-zinc-800 text-zinc-400 hover:text-zinc-100 rounded-md px-3 py-1.5 transition-colors

input.chat_input: w-full bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-700 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-zinc-100 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-transparent placeholder:text-zinc-500

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements MUST have a visible hover state (e.g., bg-zinc-900 -> bg-zinc-800, text-zinc-400 -> text-zinc-100).
motion_and_interactions.focus_states: High contrast focus rings required for accessibility.
motion_and_interactions.entrance: AI messages and nested data cards should use staggered fade-in + slight upward translation (translate-y-2 to 0, opacity 0 to 1).
motion_and_interactions.typing_indicator: Subtle pulse animation on 3 dots for AI thinking state.

user_avatar.description: Professional portrait of school principal/owner. Use for the user's avatar.

ai_avatar.description: Modern school building. Can be used as a header image for the 'School Pulse' or 'AI Health Report' summary card.

icons.rationale: Perfect for dense dashboards, providing a technical yet refined look.
icons.usage: Use 'weight="duotone"' for active sidebar items, 'weight="regular"' for inactive. Use solid icons for action buttons.

accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: Add data-testid to ALL interactive elements. e.g., data-testid='sidebar-tool-pulse', data-testid='chat-input', data-testid='send-message-btn'.
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Text must meet 4.5:1 minimum against zinc-900. Use text-zinc-50 for primary content, limit text-zinc-500 to non-essential labels.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: lucide-react (or phosphor), framer-motion, recharts.
Set up Tailwind dark mode exclusively (add 'dark' class to html/body or force dark theme in config).
Implement the 3-column layout: Nav (Icons), Sidebar (Tools + History), Main (Chat).
The chat interface should render custom React components (cards, tables) as 'messages' from the AI based on the mock data.
Make sure the 'available tools panel' is explicitly at the TOP of the left sidebar, with chat history below it.
Use standard Shadcn components for tables and cards, but strip heavy shadows and use flat borders as per E1 style.
Load static/mock data for modules like 'School Pulse', 'Fee Collection', 'Staff Tracker', etc., into the chat flow.
